text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a great run in the Keisei Hai, Eishin Flash is
interviewed about her plans moving forward.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She stuns the reporters by confidently declaring
her intention to take on the Classic Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her strong contemporaries are a non-factor. Now
that she has a feel for the course, her preparation
for the Satsuki Sho is complete.
